title: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
user_story: As an enterprise customer, I want to use multi-factor authentication when logging in, so that my organization meets its security compliance requirements.

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can enable TOTP-based authenticator app as a second factor during login
Users can configure SMS as a fallback MFA method when TOTP is unavailable
MFA setup wizard guides users through enrolling their authenticator app with a QR code
Organization administrators can enforce MFA for all users in their tenant
Login flow prompts for second factor only after successful password verification

title: Implement Magic Link Login
user_story: As a user, I want to log in via a magic link sent to my email, so that I can access my account without remembering a password.

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can request a magic link from the login page by entering their email address
Magic link email is delivered within 30 seconds of request
Magic link expires after 15 minutes if unused
Clicking the magic link authenticates the user and creates a valid session

title: Configurable Session Timeout per Organization
user_story: As an organization administrator, I want to configure session timeout duration for my users, so that I can meet our compliance requirements for inactive session handling.

acceptance_criteria.description: Administrators can set session timeout between 5 minutes and 24 hours
Default session timeout remains at 30 minutes for organizations that do not customize it
Users are warned 2 minutes before their session expires with an option to extend
Session timeout setting applies to all users within the organization

title: Implement Token Revocation Mechanism
user_story: As a security engineer, I want to revoke compromised JWT tokens immediately, so that stolen tokens cannot be used to access the system.

acceptance_criteria.description: Administrators can revoke a specific user's active tokens from the security dashboard
Revoked tokens are rejected on subsequent API requests within 60 seconds
Token revocation is logged in the security audit trail with timestamp and admin identity

title: Improve Account Lockout Recovery Flow
user_story: As a user who has been locked out, I want a clear and reliable self-service recovery path, so that I can regain access to my account without contacting support.

acceptance_criteria.description: Locked out users see a clear message explaining why they are locked out and how to recover
Users can initiate account recovery via a secondary email or phone number
Recovery flow does not rely solely on email delivery to prevent spam folder issues
